{{Quote|The Gejallis were among the clans that confused openness for weakness and sought to defeat the Anjiliacs. I am the survivor.|[[Vago Gejalli Thokka]]|<ref name="Scourge" />}}
'''Gejalli''' was a [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] clan, or [[Kajidic/Legends|kajidic]].<ref name="TF">''[[Tempest Feud]]''</ref>

The Gejalli were enemies of the [[Shell Hutts]], who bought [[A-series assassin droid]]s for use against them.<ref name="NGD">''[[The New Essential Guide to Droids]]''</ref> In turn, the Gejalli were rumored to have kept a number of [[Nimbus commando]]s on retainer.<ref name="GAW">''[[Galaxy at War]]''</ref>

During the [[New Republic era]], the Gejalli opposed [[Popara Anjiliac Diresto]] of the [[Anjiliac]] clan, due to an important commercial franchise. This led to a war between both clans. Popara annihilated all the Gejalli but one: [[Vago Gejalli Thokka]]. Vago was adopted and raised by Popara himself.<ref name="TF" />
